$schema_note: SHARED cross-department SOP manifest for the Social Media in a Box engine (Skill 57). This is the universal-sops face of the capability: it is how ANY department (social-media / marketing / podcast / graphics / crm) discovers and drives the end-to-end social pipeline. It does NOT re-implement the engine. The authoritative machine spine lives in the skill: 57-social-media-in-a-box/SOCIAL-MANIFEST.json (the phase machine P0->P8 + fold/creative/defer phases + every AF-SM-* code), scripts/prove_bands.py + scripts/validate_contract.py + scripts/preflight_gate.py + scripts/scrub_gate.py + scripts/build_manifest.py + scripts/ledger.py (the fail-closed, model-free provers), run_social_media.py (the deterministic orchestrator, front-door-nonce gated by social-media-entry.sh), and config/bands.json (the SACRED bands). This file mirrors the email-craft / fb-ad-craft enforcement-spine pattern so a department reads ONE manifest to know the SOP phases, the owning roles, the SOP for each phase, and the gate codes. SOP-LOCKED: any added/changed SOP, band, or gate MUST stay in lockstep with 57-social-media-in-a-box/SOCIAL-MANIFEST.json and the provers. Supersedes 35-social-media-planner.

authoritative_engine.poster: GHL Social Planner (services.leadconnectorhq.com/social-media-posting/{locationId}/posts) — GHL-direct only, one poster per location

design_law: Enforcement, not description. Provers freeze the FRAME, never the PICTURE. SACRED bands (config/bands.json) are the DEFAULT floor; a logged client-exact override wins over a default band and is recorded on the process certificate (client gets EXACTLY what they ask for — NEVER floored or capped). The publisher physically cannot run without a complete signed manifest that proves ZERO Anthropic for that run; done is claimed ONLY from the certificate PLUS a live GHL post-listing verify (never the poster's own return). GHL-direct is the only sanctioned posting path; a hand-rolled poster in a run dir is AF-SM-POST-BYPASS (BYPASS-SCAN). A SILENT deviation is the only forbidden deviation. Client runtime uses the CLIENT's OWN provider chain + OWN GHL PIT + social accounts — NEVER Anthropic / claude-* ids or operator keys. There is NO n8n and NO Airtable at runtime (baked prompts, local SQLite ledger, local labeled deliverables). Every deterministic gate is provider-neutral Python that runs identically on every box.

phases.name: Intake — normalize the owner's ask (theme / brief / client-exact override / client-copy) into the right slot; never negotiate, never floor/cap a stated number
phases.produces_artifact: working/plan/plan.json (+ working/creative/brief.json / overrides.json / client-copy/*.json when the client steers)
phases.gate: plan.json carries a non-empty themeOfWeek (+ plannerSheetId for a full week). A client-exact number is logged in working/creative/overrides.json (who asked / verbatim ask / scope) or the certificate is refused downstream. A self-attested 'captured' flag is NEVER trusted.

phases.name: Run — the ONE front door walks the mode's phase subset IN ORDER with no skips; fail-closed preflight + engine hash-pin + BYPASS-SCAN
phases.gate: preflight_gate.py PASS (credits/balance/PIT/config/status + C2 live connected-accounts reconcile) before anything; a direct orchestrator call bypassing social-media-entry.sh exits 4; the engine sha must match ENGINE-PIN.sha256; no hand-rolled poster in the run dir.

phases.name: Creative interjection — the M1-M4 lanes + I1-I12 injection points; provers gate FORM only; every applied override is logged
phases.produces_artifact: working/creative/brief.json + overrides.json + applied.json + client-copy/*.json; the certificate 'creative' block
phases.gate: validate_contract.py PASS (valid JSON, per-platform required keys, em-dash ban, single-digit grid, JSON-safe QC) AND prove_bands.py PASS (every SACRED band, or a logged client-exact override). An applied band that differs from bands.json with no matching logged override refuses the certificate. In client-copy mode the published bytes hash-match the supplied copy.

phases.name: Verify — scrub screen, the signed process certificate, and GHL-direct publish proven by a LIVE post-listing; verifier != author
phases.gate: scrub_gate.py PASS (zero client-name / secret / pinData / Anthropic) over content AND shipped bytes; build_manifest.py mints the certificate ONLY on a full-pass with a per-call provenance record proving ZERO Anthropic and prompt hashes matching the pin; the publisher returns the normalized {platform, success, totalPosts, processedAccounts, errors}; done is proven against a LIVE GHL post-listing. De-dup AF-SM-DOUBLE-POST clears ONLY by a logged owner re-post token.

phases.name: Engage — the read-only 7-day metrics poll -> anomaly report (mints NO certificate; NEVER blocks a publish run)
phases.gate: read-only poll of likes/views over the last 7 days -> anomaly report routed to notifyChannel. No posting -> no BYPASS-SCAN concern; mints no certificate by design. The (v0.5.0) memory-core Dreaming feed is a deferred output adapter riding this report (C11).

fold_and_defer_notes.$note: The FOLD modes each land as a first-class standalone mode under the SAME entry+nonce+prover spine and, when their config toggle is set, run as additional certified runs inside the weekly cadence. Their band codes are enforced by prove_bands.py and belong to S2-CREATIVE/S1-RUN in SOP terms.

deferred.$note: syndicate C9 (v0.4.0), narrated-video C8 (v0.3.0), persona-adapter C10 (v0.5.0), memory-adapter C11 (v0.5.0) each fail CLOSED with a clear 'deferred to vX.Y.Z' message; baseline config-carried behavior is never blocked meanwhile.

owning_roles.note: Existing role-library seats gain the Social Media in a Box engine as a Section-8 tool; no new department is required. See 23-ai-workforce-blueprint/templates/role-library/. Deferred platform specialists (threads / bluesky / reddit / quora / discord) are wired only when syndicate C9 lands in v0.4.0.
